meaning: n.<美>酒吧间老板 酒吧间招待
examples: I've come to pour them out to the sympathetic ear of the local barkeep.
There is some pretty convincing evidence that Aberforth Dumbledore is the barkeep at the Hog's Head.
If you're hungry, the barkeep hands you a menu and a phone so you can place a delivery order from the Wolfgang Puck Gourmet Express next door.
But at this point, I recommend tossing your car keys to the barkeep and catching a cab. 2013 might bring a mean hangover.
